payload.answer: Refuse to commit the conflicting employment update as a current durable memory; treat as unresolved conflict unless the system provides a source of truth or confirmation.
payload.conflict_classification: direct_entity_role_conflict (employment at same organization vs left/joined another)

entity_resolution.reason: Existing durable fact states Sam works at Goldman. Proposed update states Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, which directly conflicts. Without a reliable resolution source, the new employment status should not be committed as current.

details: Conflict detected between existing fact ('Sam works at Goldman') and incoming proposed update ('Sam left Goldman and joined Point72').
No authoritative resolution metadata provided; therefore durable memory update is blocked.

repair_options: Ask for confirmation of Sam’s current employer and effective date (or last verified timestamp).
Store a non-current/uncertain note (e.g., 'Previously reported: left Goldman; joined Point72') only if allowed by policy for non-durable or time-bounded facts.
If both facts must be retained, store them with explicit time qualifiers and mark conflict as resolved only when dates/source match.
